methodNotes: QUESTION_BANK counts from live bank (2533) cross-checked with analysis/bank_stats.json and source_inventory.json.
EXAM_PACKS itemCountExtracted from data/exam_packs.js meta + source_inventory exam_pack_counts (items[] length matches meta per check_no_caps).
Raw numbered counts: ZWSP-aware regex (^|\n)\s*(\d{1,4})\s*\.\s*[\u200b\u200c\u200d\ufeff\u00a0]* ; Sep uses N) form; Oct mostly plain N.
Mar–June vs bank abtal: normalize lower+collapse spaces+strip ZWSP; match first 80 chars (prefix) against source=abtal stems.

bank.byTopic_audit_alt_note: AUDIT_REPORT_2026-07-20 had restorative 912 / oms 449 (±1 drift); bank_stats.json is the reference used here (sums to 2533).

examPacks.purpose: Full PDF stems + notes. Not SCFHS keys.

packs.title: Mar–June 2026 · أبطال الديجيتال
packs.disclaimer: Full PDF stem extract + inline notes/bullets. Community ✅ often wrong — not SCFHS keys.

mar_june.renumberEvents: yes — restarts at 1 each month (March→April→May→June); monthCounts sum 162+350+355+369=1236

oct.label: Oct 2025
oct.note: Plain N. stems (little/no ZWSP); some false-positive numbered list lines possible in plain regex

marJuneVsBankAbtal.matchMethod: normalize: lower + collapse spaces + strip ZWSP; rough presence = first 80 chars prefix match against bank source=abtal (also checked any-bank: same 229)
sample_missing_15: treatment of choice for un-controlled diabetic patients with class 3 ?¿
questions about pain killer for asthmatic patient
x-ray with an implant ?(depend on pic)
indicates the presence of intercellular autoantibodies of igg, c3 . what is the
marJuneVsBankAbtal.interpretation: Bank abtal (1181) is a deduped multi-window merge, not a full import of every Mar–June OCR line. ~81% of unique Mar–June extract stems lack a rough 80-char match in bank abtal — large real gap and/or heavy rephrasing during import. Soft prefix can both miss paraphrases and false-positive short stems.

saud_delta.note: All 226 have non-empty explanations (≥40 chars). FOLLOWUP_AUDIT_2026-07-20: clinical hinges rewritten 2026-07-20; 0 provenance-style blocks remaining.

risks: OCR junk: PDF→txt has mojibake, broken words, ¿ symbols, duplicated lines, Arabic shaping issues
Renumbering per month: Mar–June and Dec–Feb restart at 1 each section → numberedMatchCount is sum of sections, not global max
Image-only questions: 'ortho classification pic', 'X-ray with an implant', figure-only stems → empty/weak options; ~32 bank items usable:false for image dependency
Community ✅ in packs are not SCFHS keys
ZWSP (U+200B) after question numbers in أبطال extracts breaks naive /^\d+\./ parsers
Near-duplicates across months inflate extract vs unique bank
Soft 80-char prefix match underestimates paraphrase hits and can false-positive short generic stems
Sep uses N) numbering; Oct mostly plain N. — single regex does not fit all packs
Bank abtal explanations often still community-style; do not treat as verified clinical keys
